description: pinned to the wall by a jagged shard
impaled.omen_clue: {npc_name} was pinned to a wall by a {hazard_name}.
impaled.death_message_template: A {hazard_name} pierced {npc_name} through the chest and into the wall. Jesus, they were just stuck there like a pin cushion.

crushed.omen_clue: I heard their bones snapping as they were crushed.
crushed.death_message_template: {npc_name} never saw it coming. The {hazard_name} crushed them before they could scream.

burned.omen_clue: {npc_name} was screaming as the fire took them.
burned.death_message_template: {npc_name} couldn't escape the heat. The {hazard_name} turned their sanctuary into an oven.

frozen.omen_clue: I saw them blue and shivering before going still.
frozen.death_message_template: {npc_name} slowed to a halt, the frost claiming them. The {hazard_name} left them as a statue.

electrocuted.omen_clue: {npc_name}'s body convulsed as sparks rained down.
electrocuted.death_message_template: {npc_name} completed the circuit. The {hazard_name} stopped their heart instantly.

drowned.omen_clue: I saw {npc_name} gasping for air as water filled their lungs.
drowned.death_message_template: The water rose too fast. {npc_name} vanished beneath the surface of the {hazard_name}.

chemical.death_message_template: {npc_name} clawed at their throat, but the air itself was poison. The {hazard_name} left them silent.

shredded.omen_clue: I heard the grinding of gears and {npc_name}'s scream cut short.
shredded.death_message_template: {npc_name} fell into the {hazard_name} and was torn apart in seconds.

falling.omen_clue: I saw them falling from a great height, screaming all the way down.
falling.death_message_template: {npc_name} lost their footing and the {hazard_name} sent them plummeting to their doom.
